title: Yosemite National Park
description: Yosemite National Park offers 13 popular campgrounds, with options ranging from developed, central sites in Yosemite Valley to rustic high-country spots along Tioga Road. Amenities include fire rings, picnic tables, food lockers, and access to flush toilets.
author: 6a29f6e923d790e7f3b6631a
